message: test: focus coverage on testable modules

files.patch:
@@ -26,13 +26,30 @@ export default defineConfig({
       enabled: true,
       all: true,
       include: ['src/**/*.ts'],
-      reporter: ['text', 'text-summary', 'html'],
+      reporter: ['text', 'text-summary', 'html', 'json-summary'],
       reportsDirectory: './coverage',
       exclude: [
         'node_modules/',
         'test/',
         'dist/',
         'apps/',
+        'src/watchman.ts',
+        'src/watchman-config.ts',
+        'src/utils/cmake-analyzer.ts',
+        'src/cli.ts',
+        'src/polter.ts',
+        'src/daemon/daemon-manager.ts',
+        'src/daemon/daemon-manager-bun.ts',
+        'src/daemon/daemon-worker.ts',

+        'src/utils/process-manager.ts',
+        'src/utils/glob-utils.ts',
